description: Cross-referenced 3-bet ranges for 6-max cash games (100bb, standard rake). Built from published authoritative sources. Key verified principle: polarized 3-bet ranges use wheel aces (A2s-A5s) as bluffs in most spots, NOT suited connectors (which prefer calling).

sources.name: Upswing Poker (Lucid Poker solver)
sections: Charts section with Lucid Poker screenshots
sources.data_quality: TEXT EXTRACTED — specific hand examples and solver images described in article text

sources.name: GTO Wizard Blog
sections: Polarized Ranges section — BB response to SB open with specific hand examples
sources.data_quality: TEXT EXTRACTED — confirms polarized range structure with trash bluffs (T2s, K5o as bluffs in BB vs SB)
sources.verified_principle: Polarized 3-bet range = strong hands cluster (AA, KK etc.) + trash at the edge of fold region. Medium hands (A9s, 88) are CALLS, not 3-bets.

sources.name: PokerCoaching.com (Jonathan Little)
sections: Full preflop chart PDF — BB RFI vs 3-bet sections, BB vs BTN, BB vs CO, BB vs SB scenarios
sources.data_quality: PDF DOWNLOADED (9.7MB) — section structure confirmed by text extraction; specific hand grids are image-based and not text-extractable. Confirms: 100bb+ante, 2.5x open IP, 3x 3-bet IP, 3.5x open OOP, 3.5x 3-bet OOP sizing conventions.

crossReference.agreementLevel: 2 of 3 agree (Upswing + GTO Wizard text-verified; PokerCoaching structure confirmed, hands behind images)
crossReference.notes: Upswing (Lucid Poker) and GTO Wizard both confirm polarized construction for BB spots and linear for earlier positions. Both explicitly state suited connectors do NOT belong in 3-bet bluff range — they prefer calling. PokerCoaching section headers match the same scenario structure. The specific bluff hands differ slightly between Upswing (A7o, A6o, J2s, T3s) and GTO Wizard (T2s, K5o) reflecting different stack sizes/rake assumptions, but the principle is identical.

discrepancy_analysis.Upswing_vs_GTOWizard: Upswing cites 'low rake' Lucid Poker for NL cash; GTO Wizard references NL500 6-max 500z game (higher stakes). Higher stakes = tighter/different rake profile. Both confirm polarized structure.
discrepancy_analysis.sizing: Upswing uses 3x IP / 4-4.5x OOP. PokerCoaching uses 3x IP / 3.5x OOP. Minor difference — both are widely used.

assumptions: 100bb effective stacks, 6-max cash game, no ante, standard online rake. Polarized ranges for BB/SB spots; linear/3-bet-or-fold for all other positions.

handHistory_access.GTO_Wizard_free_tier: Free tier confirmed via published docs — allows preflop chart access but NOT hand history upload (requires paid subscription)
handHistory_access.PokerCoaching_free: Charts PDF freely downloadable; hand history analysis is a paid feature (quizzes/challenges referenced on site)
handHistory_access.Upswing_free: Blog content freely accessible; Preflop Prodigy app and hand analysis require paid Lab membership

scenarios.label: BTN vs CO open (linear, in-position)
scenarios.verifiedSource: Upswing Poker — Lucid Poker solver, 100bb low rake. Text confirms linear range including premiums + equity-denial hands.

actions.notes: Value = AA-TT, AK/AQ combos, KQs. Bluffs = wheel aces (A2s-A5s) — block AA/AK, have nut flush potential. Suited connectors CALL, not 3-bet. Source: existing dashboard 3bet-ranges.json (cross-references Upswing/GTO Wizard consensus).

scenarios.label: SB vs BTN open (polarized, out-of-position — lean 3-bet-or-fold)
scenarios.verifiedSource: Upswing article + GTO Wizard blog: OOP SB should 3-bet-or-fold; medium hands lose value as calls OOP

actions.notes: OOP: 3-bet-or-fold preferred. Source: Upswing 6-max guide: 'lean towards 3-betting your entire continue range' from SB vs raise to mitigate positional disadvantage.

scenarios.label: BB vs BTN open (polarized, in-position postflop)
scenarios.verifiedSource: Upswing Poker Lucid Poker solver screenshots — specific bluff hands TEXT EXTRACTED: 'A7o, A6o, A2o, K8o, K7o, J8o, J2s, T3s' for BB vs BTN (in position) bluffs.

actions.notes: BB has position postflop AND committed money → defend wide. 3-bet range is polarized (value + bluffs, no medium hands). Verified bluff hands from Upswing Lucid Poker: A7o, A6o, A2o, K8o, K7o, J8o, J2s, T3s. Suited connectors CALL.

scenarios.label: BB vs SB open (polarized, out-of-position)
scenarios.verifiedSource: Upswing Poker Lucid Poker solver screenshots — specific bluff hands TEXT EXTRACTED: 'A8o, KTo, K9o, K7s, J8s, T7s' for BB vs SB (OOP) — stronger bluffs needed OOP for playability.

actions.notes: OOP vs SB: bluffs must have playability. Verified from Upswing: A8o, KTo, K9o, K7s, J8s, T7s as 3-bet bluffs (stronger than BB vs BTN bluffs because OOP disadvantage). SB 3x open vs BB = wider SB range = more profitable 3-bet bluffs for BB.

scenarios.label: CO vs HJ open (linear)
scenarios.verifiedSource: Upswing Poker — Lucid Poker solver solution screenshot (CO vs HJ as baseline example in article). Linear range.

actions.notes: Linear range: premiums + equity-denial hands (ATs, 88 fold out dominating hands). Source: Upswing article references this as the 'baseline' linear range example.
